channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: "How many of our 'problems' are just a lack of political willpower?" All the big ones. Just flip the...
item.description: "How many of our 'problems' are just a lack of political willpower?" All the big ones. Just flip the switch.

item.title: @elonmusk: And two days from now on FB 😂
item.description: And two days from now on FB 😂

item.title: @elonmusk: China is moving rapidly to a solar/electric future with very little need for oil or gas
item.description: China is moving rapidly to a solar/electric future with very little need for oil or gas

item.title: @elonmusk: Electricity output is the single best proxy for industrial capacity
item.description: Electricity output is the single best proxy for industrial capacity

item.title: @elonmusk: The names of those who block the Save Act will go down in infamy
item.description: The names of those who block the Save Act will go down in infamy

item.title: @elonmusk: Ilhan Omar’s father was a colonel serving in the genocidal regime of Somali dictator Siad Barre. His...
item.description: Ilhan Omar’s father was a colonel serving in the genocidal regime of Somali dictator Siad Barre. His years of service included the 1977-1979 Oagden War which saw horrific crimes and human rights abuses. You father was amongst those responsible for the horrors of war.

item.title: @elonmusk: Anyone but a straight, able-bodied, white man may apply for this assistant professor job. How is thi...
item.description: Anyone but a straight, able-bodied, white man may apply for this assistant professor job. How is this legal?

item.title: @elonmusk: This is extremely common in China and you can literally watch it happen through historical satellite...
item.description: This is extremely common in China and you can literally watch it happen through historical satellite imagery. Many sites were developed with coal, and have since been converted into solar farms. Go look at google earth and see for yourself.

item.title: @elonmusk: If ethnicity exists at all, which it obviously does, then English is an ethnicity. This is a simple ...
item.description: If ethnicity exists at all, which it obviously does, then English is an ethnicity. This is a simple statement of fact. It is possible to be culturally English or French or Japanese, etc, but ethnically be different. The first is “software”, the other is “hardware”. This should not be license to be cruel or unfair to people of a different ethnicity. I believe we should be fair to all ethnicities, but not pretend that one or another does not exist.

item.title: @elonmusk: CATO will classify him as “right wing” because he’s a religiously-inspired jihadist and “American” b...
item.description: CATO will classify him as “right wing” because he’s a religiously-inspired jihadist and “American” because he’s naturalized. That’s how their vaunted terrorist database works. But then they’ll also be classifying him as a net-paying immigrant because he won’t be taking social security. I’m serious. I am not exaggerating.
